task_objective: Fix the post-commit hook so frontend verification can run when pnpm is not directly on PATH.
design_decisions: Keep direct pnpm as the preferred path.
Use npm exec -- pnpm run verify as the fallback because it succeeded in this environment.
Update the installed .git/hooks/post-commit alongside the tracked script so the local hook is fixed immediately.
results: Validation results are recorded in the final task response.
